Title: haversine_deg_km
Description:
Given latitudes and longitudes of two points in degrees, calculates the approximate distance between
    	that points in kilometers

The function calculates the approximate distance between two points, using haversine formula with an adjustment
    	for case when points are ends of some diameter.
Note that the order of arguments is latitude-longitude, not longitude-latitude.
Examples:
-- select haversine_deg_km (-90,0,90,0)
haversine_deg_km
VARCHAR
20003.88915449353
-- select haversine_deg_km (0,0,0,180) - haversine_deg_km (-90,0,90,0)
temp
VARCHAR
33.61918829571368
